content:
flowchart TB
    A[IF Evidence Base Architecture] --> B["Supervised RCT 5"]
    A --> C["Pragmatic RCT 10"]
    A --> D["Real-World Observational 7"]
    B --> B1["108 adults MetS"]
    B --> B2["Clean causal inference"]
    B --> B3["Cannot address long-term mortality"]
    C --> C1["54 community adults"]
    C --> C2["Ecologically valid"]
    C --> C3["Small N limits precision"]
    D --> D1["Commercial app cohort"]
    D --> D2["Ages 18-100"]
    D --> D3["Weaker internal validity"]
    E[WHO Obesity Epidemic Framing 8] --> A
